title: Onlyblends.Mixer
text:
Fixed copy function of Nodes, where “CTRL+V” of nodes caused Blender to crash ## v0.1.3 Hotfix
Loading a .blend file containing Mixer nodes should now work better
Oscillator Nodes and ‘Geometry to Sample’ Nodes update the Node tree after loading the .blend file.
General fix for ‘Geometry to Sample’ Node





Complete Refactor
The basic Node functions moved to OnlyBlends.Core https://github.com/Zulhakar/OnlyBlendsCore
MIDI Import
MIDI to Track
Track Sample
Import Sound Node
Sound To Sample Node
Removed “Instrument Node” -> Use “Track Sample” Node
Connection to Geometry Nodes via “Geometry Modifier Object” and “Object To Sample”
